title: The Cartographer's Last Meridian II
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced Portuguese cartographer in 1519 must navigate a mutinous crew and his own failing eyesight to complete the first map of the unknown southern continent before a rival Spanish expedition steals the credit.
long_description: A disgraced Portuguese cartographer in 1519 must navigate a mutinous crew and his own failing eyesight to complete the first map of the unknown southern continent before a rival Spanish expedition steals the credit.
